---
title: "final paper"
author: "Phoebe Dupa, Rebecca Martinez, and Shucan Zhao"
date: "Spring 2026"
format:
  pdf: 
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 8
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,breakanywhere,commandchars=\\\{\}}
editor: source
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---
